holdings.infoBox: DFAE is an equity ETF with a total of 6193 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 12.35%, Samsung Electronics at 5.89%, SK hynix at 5.49%, Tencent Holdings at 2.35%, and MediaTek at 1.20%.

overview.description: The Dimensional Emerging Core Equity Market ETF (DFAE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects emerging markets securities of all sizes with a tilt toward small-cap companies, seeking to provide long-term capital appreciation. DFAE was launched on Dec 2, 2020 and is issued by Dimensional.
